channel.title: Rx Shortage Radar
channel.description: Latest public FDA drug shortage records from openFDA.

item.title: Current: Atropine Sulfate Injection (0409-4910-34)
item.description: Atropine Sulfate, Injection, (Adult) 0.5 mg/5 mL (0.1 mg/mL) LifeShield® ABBOJECT® Glass Syringe (20 G x 1 1/2) (NDC 0409-4910-34)" Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-25 Company: Hospira, Inc., a Pfizer Company Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.title: Current: Atropine Sulfate Injection (0409-4911-34)
item.description: Atropine Sulfate, Injection, (Adult)1 mg/10 mL (0.1 mg/mL) LifeShield® ABBOJECT® Glass Syringe (20 G x 1 1/2) (NDC 0409-4911-34)" Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-25 Company: Hospira, Inc., a Pfizer Company Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug

item.description: Bumetanide, Injection, .25 mg/1 mL (NDC 0641-6007-10) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-25 Company: Hikma Pharmaceuticals USA, Inc. Additional lots are scheduled for manufacturing to meet demand. Product will be made available as it is released.

item.title: Current: Hydroxocobalamin Injection (50633-310-11)
item.description: Cyanokit, Injection, 5 g/250mL (NDC 50633-310-11) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-25 Company: BTG International Inc. Cyanokit is available to order. To address the drug shortage, BTG International Inc (a SERB Pharmaceuticals company) coordinated with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) to make the following impacted batches available to U.S. patients during this period of shortage.

item.title: Current: Ifosfamide Injection (0143-9530-01)
item.description: Ifosfamide, Injection, 50 mg/1 mL (NDC 0143-9530-01) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-25 Company: Hikma Pharmaceuticals USA, Inc. Additional lots will be available in the June – July 2026 timeframe. Product will be made available as it is released.

item.title: Current: Ifosfamide Injection (0143-9531-01)
item.description: Ifosfamide, Injection, 50 mg/1 mL (NDC 0143-9531-01) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-25 Company: Hikma Pharmaceuticals USA, Inc. Additional lots are scheduled for manufacturing to meet demand. Product will be made available as it is released.
